name: Smart Capture
description: Universal capture skill. Extracts structured intent(s) from a user's text and/or image and returns a draft list of intents (tool, recipe, shopping_list, knowledge_fact, project, room, album, wood, manual, saw_blade, cook_log, or other). Use this whenever the user wants to ADD/CAPTURE/INVENTORY/REMEMBER/TRACK something concrete. The skill DOES NOT write anything by itself — it returns extraction results. After receiving the results, present them to the user, ask for any corrections or missing fields, then call the `capture-commit` skill once per intent to actually save. Compound captures (e.g., 'add this recipe AND put ingredients on shopping list') return multiple intents — confirm and commit each one. If the user provides an image, pass its absolute path or path relative to /files in the image_path parameter.
author: Michael

text.description: What the user said about the thing they want to capture. Free-form. Either text or image_path is required.

image_path.description: Path to an image file to include in the extraction. Either an absolute /files/... path or a relative inbox/foo.jpg path. Optional. Vision will run if provided.

domain_hint.description: Optional bias for the classifier. One of: tool, saw_blade, wood, album, manual, house_room, recipe, cook_log, shopping_list, knowledge_fact, project, other. Leave blank to let the AI decide.
